llm.name: Name
llm.confirmDeleteActiveWithFallback: You are deleting the active provider. After deletion, the app will switch to "{{name}}". Continue?
llm.confirmDeleteActiveWithoutFallback: You are deleting the only active provider. After deletion, no active provider will remain and AI features will stop working. Continue?
llm.activeProviderDeletedFallback: The active provider was deleted. Switched to "{{name}}".
llm.activeProviderDeletedEmpty: The active provider was deleted. No active provider is configured now.
llm.testMissingFields: Fill in the base URL, API key, and model first
llm.presetCustomDesc: Manually enter the API base URL and model

general.title: General Settings
general.languageDesc: Change the display language of the application
general.translationTargetLanguageDesc: When auto-execute is enabled, subtitles will be translated into this language after transcription
general.transcriptionModelDesc: When auto-execute is enabled, downloaded media will use this model for the transcription step
general.defaultDownloadPathDesc: Download tasks will save here by default. If unset, the workspace folder is used.
general.defaultDownloadPathUnset: Not set. The workspace folder will be used.
general.cliPathDesc: Set the local faster-whisper CLI executable path. This path is used when the CLI transcription engine is selected.
general.autoExecuteDesc: Automatically trigger subsequent steps after a task completes (Download → Transcribe → Translate → Synthesize).
general.ytDlpDesc: Update the bundled yt-dlp downloader. Restart the backend if the new version is not applied immediately.
